decisions.rollback_condition: agents skip startup routing in clean-host scenarios
installed host startup loses fallback when CLI is unavailable

decisions.expected_cost_change: fewer default bytes and fewer rereads of Memory detail when no matched route exists
decisions.rollback_condition: agents miss a required Memory pull/capture decision because selectors or action signals no longer surface it

decisions.expected_cost_change: fewer default bytes while preserving install/payload compatibility evidence by selector
decisions.rollback_condition: agents fail to discover payload or artifact compatibility problems during startup recovery

decisions.observed_evidence: default startup exposes source and owner skill breakdown even when the actionable required/recommended skill projection is compact
decisions.before_after_cost_signal: before: catalog repeats source, owner, and source list detail in default startup; after: default keeps counts and catalog.command while full breakdown stays recoverable through the skills command
decisions.expected_cost_change: fewer default bytes while preserving required skill projection and task-specific catalog search
decisions.authority_boundary_guardrail: catalog.command must preserve package-owned skill metadata and must not present generated or host-local catalogues as package authority
decisions.rollback_condition: agents miss a required skill because required/recommended projections no longer name it

decisions.observed_evidence: docs-only implement dogfood exposed unmatched roadmap relevance and advisory backlog detail even when candidate pressure was observed and non-blocking
decisions.before_after_cost_signal: before: docs-only implement emitted 26527 bytes with a 5681-byte planning_safety_gate; after: it emits 21456 bytes with a 2549-byte planning_safety_gate and keeps full detail behind drill_down.detail_command
decisions.expected_cost_change: fewer default bytes and fewer rereads of unrelated roadmap candidates during bounded implement turns
decisions.authority_boundary_guardrail: default counts must not turn unrelated planning candidates into hard blockers; full candidate evidence remains available from verbose implement context
decisions.rollback_condition: agents miss candidate-lane promotion requirements or cannot audit why candidate pressure changed

decisions.observed_evidence: bounded implement turns repeated Memory authority, limits, and owner-surface lists even when the required decision was pull/capture status plus commands
decisions.before_after_cost_signal: before: docs-only implement memory_decision_packet emitted 1831 bytes; after: it emits 860 bytes while preserving pull/capture statuses and commands
decisions.expected_cost_change: fewer default bytes while preserving the explicit agent-owned Memory decision before claim
decisions.authority_boundary_guardrail: default compacting must not hide pull/capture status, route commands, relevant candidate routes, or the agent-owned decision boundary; full authority detail remains available in verbose implement context
decisions.rollback_condition: agents skip required Memory pull/capture decisions or cannot recover full authority and owner-surface detail
